examples: To line or panel(a room or wall) with wainscoting.
I saw him stick his beastly nose out of the wainscoting.
I wish you could see the wainscoting in that drawing-room, Joe!
Mr. Sunderman's garage features an epoxy-coated floor, as well as gold- and bronze-colored wainscoting on the walls.
With its white wainscoting and nautical paraphernalia, the room affects the look of some old dockside haunt.
